phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the market opens
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ouvre le Marché Forville le matin ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR OO-vreh leh mar-SHAY for-VEEL leh mah-TAN
phrases.cultural_note: Marché Forville opens at 7am Tuesday–Sunday. Monday is flea market day (brocante). It closes around 1pm.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find fresh Provençal herbs
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je trouver des herbes de Provence fraîches sur ce marché ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zheh troo-VAY day ZEHRB deh pro-VANS FRESH soor seh mar-SHAY
phrases.cultural_note: Vendors at Forville sell bunches of thyme, rosemary, lavender and herbes de Provence directly from local farms.

responses.english: At the back, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are any truffle vendors at the market
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des vendeurs de truffes sur ce marché ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day van-DUHR deh TROOFF soor seh mar-SHAY
phrases.cultural_note: Black truffles from Var and white truffles from Provence appear at Forville in season (winter for black, autumn for white).

phrases.intent_en: Ask which local cheeses are recommended
phrases.text_local: Quels fromages locaux me recommandez-vous de goûter ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel fro-MAZH lo-KOH meh reh-ko-man-DAY voo deh goo-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: Look for Banon (wrapped in chestnut leaves), Brousse and Tome de Provence — all made in nearby hill villages.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the market is covered in case of rain
phrases.text_local: Le marché est-il couvert en cas de pluie ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh mar-SHAY eh-TEEL koo-VEHR an KAH deh PLWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Forville is a covered market hall — you can shop whatever the weather, a rarity on the Riviera.
